Describe the sequence of actions and visible details during the initial preparation and measurement scenes.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a person in a blue tank top holds a red shot put; at 1s, text overlay displays championship details; at 2s, the athlete stands on the reddish-brown track surface; at 12s, a male athlete runs while a female official holds a measuring tape.

question: Describe the specific movements and positions observed during the final throwing event sequence.
canonical_answer: At 16s, an athlete in red and white performs a dynamic rotational throw; at 17s, a second athlete stands in the white-lined throwing circle; at 18s, a red ball lies on the grass in the foreground; at 19s, a person in a black jacket stands on a white line.
